title: WiseRecipes Tiers SSOT
description: Validates config/tiers.yaml. Every tier must have db_slug, display_name, price_usd. Paid tiers additionally require price_id_env and stripe_nickname.

version.description: Schema version — bump to 2 only with a coordinated migration.

tiers.description: Map of tier-key (matches DB tier column) -> tier metadata.

db_slug.description: Immutable DB/API contract slug. Must match DB column values exactly.

display_name.description: Human-readable label rendered in /pricing and skill cards.

price_usd.description: Monthly price in USD. 0 for free tier.

price_id_env.description: Env-var name holding the Stripe price ID. null for free tier.

stripe_nickname.description: Stripe price.nickname to enforce. Required for paid tiers.

accent_color.description: CSS hex color for UI accent.

badge.description: Short badge label (e.g. Free, Pro, Pro+).
